V-M-004.checks: Payment and webhook flows remain isolated from registration cutover, complimentary internal access stays outside payment-provider logic, and Phase-28 trial creation is delayed until verified email activation.
V-M-004.commands: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_verified_registration.py tests/test_billing_security.py tests/test_manual_access_policy.py tests/test_billing_plan_api.py -v

phase-28-trial-gates.gate-1: Pending email registration cannot create trial subscription, payment, or billing history rows.
phase-28-trial-gates.gate-2: Verified activation creates exactly one trial only when no previous trial or active subscription history blocks eligibility.
phase-28-trial-gates.gate-3: Verify token replay and duplicate activation retries cannot create a second trial.
phase-28-trial-gates.gate-4: Existing YooKassa webhook, payment confirmation, and plan admin behavior remains green.

scenarios.scenario-1: Eligible verified user receives one trial after activation.
scenarios.scenario-2: Ineligible verified user does not receive a duplicate trial.
scenarios.scenario-3: YooKassa webhook accepted with valid signature.
scenarios.scenario-4: Subscription state updated after payment confirmation.

refresh-findings.finding-1: Full V-M-004 command failed locally with 404 responses in billing webhook and billing plan API route tests because those tests still used stale /api paths.
refresh-findings.finding-2: The 404 failures were stale test route expectations using /api instead of the canonical /api/v1 billing prefixes. Router-level webhook and plan API tests were aligned and the full V-M-004 command now passes locally.

V-M-004.evidence: 2026-05-13: Phase-28 backend suite passed locally and proved pending registration creates no trial while verified activation creates one eligible trial once. 2026-05-19: Full V-M-004 command passed locally after aligning billing route tests with /api/v1 prefixes. 2026-06-01: Phase-45 backend suite passed and proves verified activation creates a pending four-day trial, first VPN handshake starts it once, countdown fields are server-derived, and paid subscriptions are not overwritten.

phase-69-verification-design.scope: Billing webhook and subscription service verification for referral reward activation.
phase-69-verification-design.gate-1: Confirmed payment must call the referral reward path only after payment state is trusted.
phase-69-verification-design.gate-2: Payment retries, duplicate notifications, and manual reprocessing must remain idempotent.
phase-69-verification-design.gate-3: Referral bonus extension must not alter canonical tariff prices, paid subscription duration, or device limits.
phase-69-verification-design.gate-4: Pending referral entitlement must integrate with first-VPN-connection activation without starting from registration time.
phase-69-verification-design.commands: cd backend && pytest tests/test_billing_service.py tests/test_trial_activation.py tests/test_referrals.py tests/test_billing_plan_api.py
